summary: Iteration 14: Comprehensive testing of the multi-step event creation wizard. All 4 steps functional with proper navigation, validation, progress bar updates, and event creation working correctly. Minor UX issue found: form data not reset when closing dialog without submitting.

issues: Form data (title, location, date) not cleared when dialog is closed via Escape or clicking X button. Only resets after successful event creation. Consider resetting newEvent state in onOpenChange handler.

action_items: MINOR: Consider resetting form data (newEvent state) when dialog closes without submission. Add reset logic to onOpenChange handler: if (!open) { setCreateStep(1); setNewEvent({...initialState}); setImagePreview(null); }
seed_data_creation: Created test event 'TEST_Creation_Flow_Event' in Marseille, France for March 20, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14: Verified multi-step event creation wizard. The wizard has 4 steps: Step 1 (Sport & Lieu - title, sport cards, date picker, location), Step 2 (Configuration - participants, price, distances, dénivelé, PPS toggle, équipes toggle), Step 3 (Visuels - image upload zone, description, 'Ajouter des épreuves' button, 'Créer l'événement' button), Step 4 (Épreuves - add races/distances with individual pricing, 'Créer l'événement' final button). Key data-testids: create-step-indicator, sport-type-grid, sport-option-{value}, event-title-input, event-date-input, event-location-input, step-next-1, step-prev-2, step-next-2, step-prev-3, step-next-3, step-prev-4, image-drop-zone, requires-pps-toggle, add-race-btn, submit-event-btn, submit-event-btn-final. DateTimePicker is a custom component with calendar popup and time selector (Valider button to confirm). Progress bar updates correctly across all 4 steps. Event creation works from Step 3 or Step 4. Minor UX issue: form doesn't reset when closing dialog via Escape without submitting.

Dialog opens from 'CRÉER' card in OrganizerNav mini-menu
Step 1: Title input, 5 sport type cards with icons and selection highlighting
Step 1: DateTimePicker calendar popup with time selection
Step 1: Location input
Step 1: Validation blocks advancement without required fields
Step 2: Participants max, Prix de base fields
Step 2: Distances, Dénivelé fields
Step 2: PPS obligatoire toggle, Équipes autorisées toggle
Step 2: 'Retour' and 'Suivant' buttons working
Step 3: Image upload drop zone
Step 3: Description textarea
Step 3: 'Retour', 'Ajouter des épreuves', 'Créer l'événement' buttons
Step 4: Add race button creates race form entries
Step 4: Race form has name, price, places max, distance km fields
Step 4: 'Retour', 'Créer l'événement' buttons
Progress bar (4 steps) updates correctly at each step
Dialog closes and step resets to 1 after successful event creation
Event creation succeeds and new event appears in list
Dialog closes via Escape key
Framer-motion animations present in wizard transitions
